issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Card text says 'place 1 card from your hand at the top of your deck' which is a deck placement action, not trash. Should use a custom action or clarify intent—likely ReturnToHand or a deck-top placement mechanic not represented in standard actions.

AttachDon count=2 is incorrect. Text says 'Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards' meaning the cards must already be rested. The action should target rested DON cards only and allow selecting 1 or 2, not automatically giving 2.

Target scope is incomplete. Text specifies 'to your Leader or 1 of your Characters'—this means DON cards are moved from their current location (likely on a card) to Leader or a chosen Character. Current DSL does not capture source of DON cards being moved.
